## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Debug build passes
- [ ] Release build passes
- [ ] Automated tests pass
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes
- [ ] Relevant macOS behavior was verified manually, or the reason it was not is documented

## Privacy and Permissions

- [ ] No notification content, keyboard input, screenshots, private APIs, or new analytics are introduced
- [ ] Any permission, persistence, network, or signing change is documented
